vercelLinkage.notes: Vercel dashboard verified: Connect Git Repository shown; no GitHub link active

lastProductionDeploy.notes: Stale CLI deploy predates /operations/* routes. GitHub master has full routes; CI build passes.

deploymentTimeline.summary: Vercel UI: aion-com has NO Git repo connected; production GsrxHVBiU is 23h-old CLI deploy. Fix = connect Git or deploy hook.

pipelineBlockers: Vercel project aion-com: Git repository not connected (dashboard shows Connect Git Repository)
GitHub Vercel App integration required for osminoog09-star/aion-project
VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK not set in GitHub secrets (workflow skips deploy)

ownerUnblock.stepA_vercel_git: https://vercel.com/osminoog09-3913s-projects/aion-com/settings/git → GitHub → select osminoog09-star/aion-project → Production branch master → Root Directory ./
ownerUnblock.stepB_deploy_hook: After Git connected: Settings → Git → Deploy Hooks → Production → copy URL → GitHub secret VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK
ownerUnblock.stepC_auto: Any git push to master triggers production deploy automatically once step A complete

autonomousRecovery: After step A: npm run deploy:validate should return allPassed true within ~2 min
deploy-hook workflow triggers on push when VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK secret set
